calendar.matters:
Petition To 1) Approve Settlement Agreement 2) Reserve Jurisdiction To Enforce Settlement Agreement Under Ccp 644.6 ; And 3) For Such Other Relief As The Probate Court Deems Just And Proper
Off Calendar Feb-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Emily Calhoun for and with Verna Shaheen, Trustee.
Benjamin D. Fox for Gregory Glassman.
Jen Paez and Stacie Nelson, interested parties, are also in attendance.

The court confirmed that all known nieces and nephews had been provided with proper notice. No objections were received from any of the noticed parties. There being no objections, the court took the matters under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Feb-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To 1) Approve Settlement Agreement 2) Reserve Jurisdiction To Enforce Settlement Agreement Under Ccp 644.6 ; And 3) For Such Other Relief As The Probate Court Deems Just And Proper
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Advanced From Jan-08-25 To Dec-17-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petitioner, Gregory Glassman'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Under Seal
Off Calendar Oct-15-2024 Advanced From Dec-18-24 To Nov-06-24 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204

Petition To 1) Approve Settlement Agreement 2) Reserve Jurisdiction To Enforce Settlement Agreement Under Ccp 644.6 ; And 3) For Such Other Relief As The Probate Court Deems Just And Proper
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Continued To Feb-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Benjamin Fox for Gregory Glassman, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Emily Calhoun for and with Verna Shaheen, Trustee.
Jennifer Paez, Counsel for Ms. Shaheen in related civil case (via Zoom).

The court inquired as to whether the settlement agreement had been signed. A copy of the settlement agreement was provided to the court and reviewed. The court noted procedural concerns, particularly regarding the adequacy of notice to all parties entitled to receive it. Ms. Calhoun expressed concerns about ensuring that all procedural requirements were met.

The court proposed continuing the matter to allow time for proper notice to be served to all relevant parties. After discussing scheduling, the court continued the matter to February 4, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. Mr. Fox was instructed to ensure all necessary documents are properly served to all parties entitled to notice.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Continued To Feb-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PTR-23-306000 The Peggy Bartel Living Trust and
PTR-24-307150 The Harry Glassman Trust.

Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for and with Verna Shaheen.
Ciaran O'Sullivan for Alley Cat Allies.
Tyson Hubbard appeared by zoom for David Bartel (trustee of the Bartel trust).
Stacie Nelson appeared by zoom for 9 of the charitable beneficiaries of the Glassman Trust.
Kevin Rodriguez appeared by zoom for the Oakland Zoo.
Phil Bond appeared by zoom for the Zoological Society of San Diego (beneficiary of the Glassman Trust).
Keith Race (beneficiary of the Glassman Trust) in propria persona.

Mrs. Calhoun informed the court that there is a typo in the proposed orders Page 5, paragraph, 7. e. (Trust "o" after" should read "on or after") and asked the court to please correct it, addressed the issues raised in the probate examiner's notes, and read and explained the terms of the settlement agreement. The Petitions for Instructions Specifically for Order Approving Settlement Agreement, etc. in both cases are under submission. The Petition for Instructions and Orders for Suspension in the Bartel Trust is off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
